# Josh Reeder-Esparza

> Full-stack developer, engineer, and designer based in Knoxville, Tennessee. Over a decade of experience building highly performant websites across multiple disciplines. Currently Head of Engineering at AltText.ai and owner of Sola Co, a consulting firm.

Josh specializes in Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, Sidekiq, and modern frontend development with TailwindCSS and Hotwire (Stimulus + Turbo). He has deep experience with AI integration (OpenAI, Azure Computer Vision), accessibility (WCAG standards, alt text optimization), and web performance.

At AltText.ai, he leads engineering for a platform that serves 70,000+ users, helping businesses improve SEO and meet accessibility standards through AI-powered image descriptions. Previously at MxU, he was the first employee and helped triple MRR over four years while building a Rails-based video training platform.

Through Sola Co, he consults with teams on web application development, performance optimization, database tuning, API design, and DevOps. He is comfortable across the full stack and with various frameworks.

Josh has agency experience building custom WordPress sites for restaurants, wineries, hotels, farms, and commodity boards. He also has e-commerce experience with Shopify and various payment/CRM integrations (Stripe, HubSpot, Intercom).

## Links

- [Resume](https://joshre.com/resume): Full work history, skill set, and portfolio of built projects
- [AltText.ai](https://alttext.ai): AI-powered image alt text platform where Josh leads engineering
- [GitHub](https://github.com/joshre): Open source and personal projects

- [Feif Leather Goods](https://joshre.com/feif/): A past project — handmade leather belts and wallets shipped internationally
